name: Absorb
description: Universal knowledge ingestion — absorb files, folders, PDFs, emails, LINE chats, Facebook posts, images, web pages, and more into The Vault (Oracle L3) or Memory (L1+L2). Triggers on /absorb, 'scan this repo', 'import this project', 'absorb my files', or 'learn from this'.

onboarding.title: Absorb — Knowledge Ingestion
onboarding.summary: Ingest files, PDFs, emails, chats, and more into your knowledge base. Optionally connect Oracle Vault for deep storage.
onboarding.why_it_matters: This is how your AI learns from your existing documents and data. Oracle Vault is optional but gives you cross-machine search.

dry_run.description: Preview what would be absorbed without writing anything

depth.description: How deeply to analyze sources: shallow=README only, normal=key files, deep=full codebase

auto_create_todos.description: Automatically create TODO items from discovered tasks

prefer_vault.description: Prefer Oracle Vault (L3) when available, otherwise fall back to Memory (L1+L2)

parser.description: Force a specific parser: text, pdf, email, line, facebook, image, meeting, web, voice_memo, debate
